productDisplayName: Palm Tree Girl's Betty Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionDark and light pink striped t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a green ribbed round neckline with a small gap,  short raglan sleeves, silver embroidered logo name on the left chest and glitter graphic on the backFittingRegular 33 cm Wash careMachine wash in cold waterWash with like coloursWash/dry inside outUse mild detergentsDo not tumble dryUse warm ironDo not iron on decorRemove all detatchable accessoriesIndulge your little one in happy feelings with this pink striped tee from palm tree. The silver embroidery on the front and the sea shore inspired silvery graphic on the back adds a touch of glamour to this t-shirt. Team this with white shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her gal pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
